requirement_topic.en: Fingrid / Distribution Operator Grid-Connection Review — IEC 62116, IEC 61727, and 230/400 V 50 Hz Settings
requirement_topic.zh: 芬兰输电/配电运营商并网审查——IEC 62116、IEC 61727及230/400 V 50 Hz参数
requirement_topic.zht: 芬蘭輸電/配電運營商併網審查——IEC 62116、IEC 61727及230/400 V 50 Hz參數

summary.en: Grid-connected solar PV inverters in Finland should be treated as project-level grid-connection equipment subject to Fingrid technical review (for transmission-connected large installations) or relevant distribution system operator (DSO) review for smaller grid-connected systems, with Energiavirasto overseeing the electricity market. The practical IEC evidence package normally includes IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface compliance, with firmware protection thresholds, reconnection delay, voltage windows, and frequency windows validated for Finland's 230/400 V, 50 Hz low-voltage grid. Finland uses the same 50 Hz frequency as China, but the nominal voltage differs: Finland is 230 V single-phase and 400 V three-phase, while China is 220/380 V under GB/T 156. Finnish conditions include extreme cold winters (down to -30°C or lower) which may affect inverter performance and derating profiles; commissioning files should document cold-climate performance.
summary.zh: 芬兰并网太阳能光伏逆变器应作为项目级并网设备处理，大型输电网连接安装接受Fingrid技术审查，较小型并网系统接受相关配电系统运营商（DSO）审查，Energiavirasto负责监管电力市场。实际IEC证据包通常包括IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727公用电网接口合规，并须针对芬兰230/400 V、50 Hz低压电网验证固件保护阈值、重连延迟、电压窗口和频率窗口。芬兰与中国同为50 Hz频率，但标称电压不同：芬兰为单相230 V、三相400 V，而中国依据GB/T 156为220/380 V。芬兰条件包括极寒冬季（低至−30°C或更低），可能影响逆变器性能和降额曲线；调试文件应记录寒冷气候性能。
summary.zht: 芬蘭併網太陽能光伏逆變器應作為項目級併網設備處理，大型輸電網連接安裝接受Fingrid技術審查，較小型併網系統接受相關配電系統運營商（DSO）審查，Energiavirasto負責監管電力市場。實際IEC證據包通常包括IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727公用電網介面合規，並須針對芬蘭230/400 V、50 Hz低壓電網驗證韌體保護閾值、重連延遲、電壓窗口和頻率窗口。芬蘭與中國同為50 Hz頻率，但標稱電壓不同：芬蘭為單相230 V、三相400 V，而中國依據GB/T 156為220/380 V。芬蘭條件包括極寒冬季（低至−30°C或更低），可能影響逆變器性能和降額曲線；調試文件應記錄寒冷氣候性能。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
Fingrid technical grid-connection requirements for the relevant installation
Energiavirasto electricity-sector approval or oversight requirements where applicable
Finland low-voltage grid context — 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for PV power station connection, NB/T 32004 for grid-connected inverter technical specifications, GB/T 37408 for PV grid-connected inverter requirements, and domestic anti-islanding test results. These documents are built around China grid conditions and domestic acceptance procedures. China's low-voltage baseline is 220/380 V at 50 Hz, not Finland's 230/400 V at 50 Hz. Chinese grid certificates and factory firmware settings do not automatically transfer to Fingrid acceptance or Energiavirasto project review in Finland.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定、NB/T 32004光伏并网逆变器技术规范、GB/T 37408光伏并网逆变器技术要求及国内防孤岛测试结果。这些文件以中国电网条件和国内验收流程为基础。中国低压基准为50 Hz、220/380 V，而非芬兰50 Hz、230/400 V。中国并网证书和出厂固件设置不能自动转移为Fingrid认可或Energiavirasto项目审查证据。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定、NB/T 32004光伏併網逆變器技術規範、GB/T 37408光伏併網逆變器技術要求及國內防孤島測試結果。這些文件以中國電網條件和國內驗收流程為基礎。中國低壓基準為50 Hz、220/380 V，而非芬蘭50 Hz、230/400 V。中國併網證書和出廠韌體設置不能自動轉移為Fingrid認可或Energiavirasto項目審查證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: China GB/T and NB/T grid-connection evidence is not a substitute for Finland Fingrid/DSO project acceptance. Exporters should prepare IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, a Finland-specific settings file, and commissioning records for 230/400 V at 50 Hz. Do not describe Finland voltage as matching China: only the 50 Hz frequency matches, while nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V. For Finnish sites, include cold-climate (-30°C or lower) derating, anti-condensation heater provision, thermal cycling effects on ingress protection seals, and cold-start performance in the project file.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T和NB/T并网证据不能替代芬兰Fingrid/配电运营商项目验收。出口商应准备IEC 62116防孤岛证据、IEC 61727公用电网接口证据、芬兰专用设置文件以及230/400 V、50 Hz调试记录。不得称芬兰电压与中国相同：仅50 Hz频率相同，标称电压不同于中国220/380 V。对于芬兰现场，项目文件应包括寒冷气候（−30°C或更低）降额、防冷凝加热器配置、温度循环对防护等级密封的影响以及冷启动性能。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T和NB/T併網證據不能替代芬蘭Fingrid/配電運營商項目驗收。出口商應準備IEC 62116防孤島證據、IEC 61727公用電網介面證據、芬蘭專用設置文件以及230/400 V、50 Hz調試記錄。不得稱芬蘭電壓與中國相同：僅50 Hz頻率相同，標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V。對於芬蘭現場，項目文件應包括寒冷氣候（−30°C或更低）降額、防冷凝加熱器配置、溫度循環對防護等級密封的影響以及冷啟動性能。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for grid-connected projects through Fingrid technical review (large installations) and DSO acceptance (smaller installations); Energiavirasto oversight applies to the Finnish electricity market
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China domestic grid acceptance only and is not a Fingrid or Finnish DSO approval substitute; China 220/380 V evidence must be revalidated for Finland 230/400 V

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T grid-connection documents do not automatically satisfy Finland Fingrid/DSO grid-connection review. Prepare IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 evidence, re-parameterise inverter firmware for Finland's 230/400 V at 50 Hz grid, and document cold-climate (-30°C or lower) derating and cold-start performance for Finnish installations. Verify current Fingrid, DSO, and Energiavirasto project requirements directly before shipment or commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T并网文件不能自动满足芬兰Fingrid/配电运营商并网审查。请准备IEC 62116和IEC 61727证据，将逆变器固件重新参数化为芬兰230/400 V、50 Hz电网，并记录芬兰安装的寒冷气候（−30°C或更低）降额和冷启动性能。出货或调试前请直接核实现行Fingrid、配电运营商和Energiavirasto项目要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T併網文件不能自動滿足芬蘭Fingrid/配電運營商併網審查。請準備IEC 62116和IEC 61727證據，將逆變器韌體重新參數化為芬蘭230/400 V、50 Hz電網，並記錄芬蘭安裝的寒冷氣候（−30°C或更低）降額和冷啟動性能。出貨或調試前請直接核實現行Fingrid、配電運營商和Energiavirasto項目要求。
